title: BEM-541.3 Telegram sender contract
objective:
Run script:
"""
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')

contract = protocols / 'TELEGRAM_OUTBOX_SENDER_CONTRACT.md'
contract.write_text('# BEM-541.3 | Telegram Outbox Sender Contract

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 14:24 (UTC+3)

## Цель
Довести Telegram reporting от `governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl` до фиксируемого delivery status.

## Pipeline
`curator-hourly-report.yml -> governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl -> sender -> telegram_delivery_result -> governance/transport/results.jsonl`

## Runtime secrets
- Telegram token/chat_id используются только runtime sender environment.
- Токены, chat_id, client_secret и callback URL запрещено писать в repo files.

## Outbox record
```json
{
  "record_type": "telegram_hourly_report",
  "cycle_id": "string",
  "status": "queued_for_sender",
  "message": "string",
  "created_at": "YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)",
  "blocker": null
}
```

## Delivery result record
```json
{
  "record_type": "telegram_delivery_result",
  "cycle_id": "string",
  "source": "telegram_sender",
  "status": "sent|sent_synthetic|failed|retry_scheduled",
  "outbox_line": 0,
  "message_hash": "string",
  "attempt": 1,
  "retry_allowed": true,
  "next_retry_at": "YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)|null",
  "blocker": null
}
```

## Rules
- No token in files.
- Delivery result must be append-only.
- Failed delivery must include retry fields.
- Hourly workflow may schedule only under contract exception `curator-hourly-report.yml`.
')

sample_success = {
  'record_type':'telegram_delivery_result',
  'cycle_id':'bem541-telegram-sender-sample',
  'source':'telegram_sender_synthetic',
  'status':'sent_synthetic',
  'outbox_line':1,
  'message_hash':'synthetic_hash_no_secret',
  'attempt':1,
  'retry_allowed':False,
  'next_retry_at':None,
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/telegram_delivery_success_sample.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:24 (UTC+3)'
}
sample_failure = {
  'record_type':'telegram_delivery_result',
  'cycle_id':'bem541-telegram-sender-sample',
  'source':'telegram_sender_synthetic',
  'status':'failed',
  'outbox_line':2,
  'message_hash':'synthetic_hash_no_secret',
  'attempt':1,
  'retry_allowed':True,
  'next_retry_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:24 (UTC+3)',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/telegram_delivery_failure_sample.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':{'code':'TELEGRAM_RUNTIME_SECRET_MISSING','message':'runtime sender secret unavailable in synthetic test'},
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:24 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'telegram_delivery_success_sample.json').write_text(json.dumps(sample_success, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')
(base/'telegram_delivery_failure_sample.json').write_text(json.dumps(sample_failure, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(sample_success, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')
    f.write(json.dumps(sample_failure, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

report = reports/'bem541_3_telegram_sender_contract.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-541.3 | Telegram Sender/Delivery Contract | PASS

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 14:24 (UTC+3)

## Выполнено
- Описан pipeline outbox -> sender -> delivery_result.
- Описаны runtime secret правила.
- Созданы sample success/failure delivery records.
- Delivery samples appended to transport.

## Blocker
null
')
proof = proofs/'bem541_3_telegram_sender_contract.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-541.3 PASS: Telegram outbox sender contract and delivery samples created.
')
changed_files.extend([str(contract), str(base/'telegram_delivery_success_sample.json'), str(base/'telegram_delivery_failure_sample.json'), str(transport), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-541.3 Telegram sender/delivery contract created')
"""
